title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
description:
Given a string `s`, find the length of the longest substring that contains no
repeating characters.
constraints: `s` consists of English letters, digits, symbols and spaces.

solutions.summary: Grow a window, jumping the left edge past any repeat.

steps.title: Start from the function shape
steps.explanation: Begin with the signature and a default `0` return.

steps.title: Track last-seen index, window start, and best
steps.explanation: `seen` maps a character to its latest index; `left` is the window start.

steps.title: Expand the window to the right
steps.explanation: Move the right edge across the string one character at a time.

steps.title: Jump the left edge past a repeat
steps.explanation: If the current character was seen inside the window, move `left` just past it.

steps.title: Record the character and update best
steps.explanation: Store this character’s index and keep the largest window width seen.

solutions.summary: From each start, extend until a repeat appears.

steps.title: Start from the function shape
steps.explanation: Begin with the signature and a default `0` return.

steps.title: Track the best length
steps.explanation: Hold the longest distinct run found so far.

steps.title: Pick each start with a fresh set
steps.explanation: For every start index, remember the characters seen since.

steps.title: Extend until a repeat
steps.explanation: Grow to the right and stop as soon as a character repeats.

steps.title: Record the character and best length
steps.explanation: Add the character and update the best run for this start.
